name: LED (Light Emitting Diode)

arduino_connection.anode: Connect to Arduino digital pin (through resistor)
arduino_connection.resistor_placement: Between Arduino pin and LED anode (or between LED cathode and GND)

common_issues: LED not lighting: Check polarity (swap legs)
LED too dim: Resistor value too high, try lower value
LED burning out: No resistor or value too low
Flickering: Insufficient power supply or PWM frequency issue
